stemHtml: The radio altimeter is required to indicate zero height AGL as the main wheels touch down on the runway. For this reason, it is necessary to…

options.a: adjust the gross height according to the aeroplane instantaneous pitch angle.
options.b: have a specific radio altimeter dedicated to automatic landing.
options.c: compensate for residual height and cable length.
options.d: change the display scale in short final, in order to have a precise readout.
